lines.english: What was 'sweet as honey' and why?
lines.chinese: 什么是“甜如蜂蜜”以及为什么？
lines.raw: What was 'sweet as honey' and why? | 什么是“甜如蜂蜜”以及为什么？

lines.english: In 1963 a Lancaster bomber crashed on Wallis Island,
lines.chinese: 1963年，一架兰开斯特轰炸机坠毁在沃利斯岛，
lines.raw: In 1963 a Lancaster bomber crashed on Wallis Island, | 1963年，一架兰开斯特轰炸机坠毁在沃利斯岛，

lines.english: a remote place in the South Pacific, a long way west of Samoa.
lines.chinese: 一个位于南太平洋的偏远地方，在萨摩亚以西很远。
lines.raw: a remote place in the South Pacific, a long way west of Samoa. | 一个位于南太平洋的偏远地方，在萨摩亚以西很远。

lines.english: The plane wasn't too badly damaged,
lines.chinese: 飞机没有损坏得太严重，
lines.raw: The plane wasn't too badly damaged, | 飞机没有损坏得太严重，

lines.english: but over the years the crash was forgotten and the wreck remained undisturbed.
lines.chinese: 但多年来，这次坠机事件被遗忘，残骸也一直未被触动。
lines.raw: but over the years the crash was forgotten and the wreck remained undisturbed. | 但多年来，这次坠机事件被遗忘，残骸也一直未被触动。

lines.english: Then in 1989, twenty-six years after the crash, the plane was accidentally rediscovered in an aerial survey of the island.
lines.chinese: 1989年，坠机26年后，在一项对该岛的空中勘测中，这架飞机被意外重新发现。
lines.raw: Then in 1989, twenty-six years after the crash, the plane was accidentally rediscovered in an aerial survey of the island. | 1989年，坠机26年后，在一项对该岛的空中勘测中，这架飞机被意外重新发现。

lines.english: By this time, a Lancaster bomber in reasonable condition was rare and worth rescuing.
lines.chinese: 此时，一架状况尚可的兰开斯特轰炸机已属罕见，值得营救。
lines.raw: By this time, a Lancaster bomber in reasonable condition was rare and worth rescuing. | 此时，一架状况尚可的兰开斯特轰炸机已属罕见，值得营救。

lines.english: The French authorities had the plane packaged and moved in parts back to France.
lines.chinese: 法国当局将飞机打包，并分批运回法国。
lines.raw: The French authorities had the plane packaged and moved in parts back to France. | 法国当局将飞机打包，并分批运回法国。

lines.english: Now a group of enthusiasts are going to have the plane restored.
lines.chinese: 现在，一群爱好者正准备修复这架飞机。
lines.raw: Now a group of enthusiasts are going to have the plane restored. | 现在，一群爱好者正准备修复这架飞机。

lines.english: It has four Rolls-Royce Merlin engines but the group will need to have only three of them rebuilt.
lines.chinese: 它有四台劳斯莱斯梅林发动机，但该团队只需要重建其中三台。
lines.raw: It has four Rolls-Royce Merlin engines but the group will need to have only three of them rebuilt. | 它有四台劳斯莱斯梅林发动机，但该团队只需要重建其中三台。

lines.english: Imagine their surprise and delight when they broke open the packing cases
lines.chinese: 想象一下，当他们打开包装箱时，是多么惊喜和高兴，
lines.raw: Imagine their surprise and delight when they broke open the packing cases | 想象一下，当他们打开包装箱时，是多么惊喜和高兴，

lines.english: and found that the fourth engine was sweet as honey--still in perfect condition.
lines.chinese: 发现第四台发动机“甜如蜂蜜”——仍然处于完美状态。
lines.raw: and found that the fourth engine was sweet as honey--still in perfect condition. | 发现第四台发动机“甜如蜂蜜”——仍然处于完美状态。

lines.english: A colony of bees had turned the engine into a hive and it was totally preserved in beeswax!
lines.chinese: 一群蜜蜂把发动机变成了一个蜂巢，它完全被蜂蜡保存了下来！
lines.raw: A colony of bees had turned the engine into a hive and it was totally preserved in beeswax! | 一群蜜蜂把发动机变成了一个蜂巢，它完全被蜂蜡保存了下来！
